severity_upgrades.evidence: validate_identity_vision (phase_c_vision.py:351-353) returns default_pass {match:True, confidence:0.7} on ANY Anthropic API exception (and the no-api-key path :260-263). On the production cloud DEEPFACE_AVAILABLE=False (insightface/DeepFace pip-optional, not installed) so the vision-LLM fallback is the PRIMARY identity path. Call path: controller.py:817 validate_image -> identity/validator.py:399-403 (DEEPFACE off) -> _vision_llm_validate_image -> phase_c_vision.validate_identity_vision -> default_pass 0.7 -> validator.py:1346 matched = 0.7 >= threshold TRUE for every standard mode (portrait 0.70 / medium 0.65 / wide 0.55 / action 0.60) -> passed=True, overall_score=0.7 -> auto_approve.py:450 fallback 0.7 >= image_min_composite_fallback 0.60 -> auto-approved. Any transient API error silently passes every in-flight shot's identity gate with a forged 0.7.
severity_upgrades.pin_note: Existing pin (test_lane_silent_gate_siblings_xfail.py::test_validate_identity_vision_warns_on_api_failure) tests only the OBSERVABILITY half (print->logger.warning). The fix must additionally make a Pair-A POLICY decision: fail-closed (return 0.0/match=False) vs pass-with-warning vs retry on transient API error. Co-sign scope must cover both print sites (:352, :262) + the no-api-key path.

severity_upgrades.evidence: domain/character_manager.py:350 constructs CostTracker() (budget_usd=None) throwaway and calls record_api_call('FLUX_KONTEXT'); spend never reaches PipelineCore.cost_tracker.spent_usd (the accumulator would_exceed/is_over_budget read). Byte-identical to W1 CRITICAL costtracker-perf-uncounted. Path: POST /api/projects/<pid>/characters -> web_server.py:587 create_character_with_images -> character_manager.py:179 _generate_multi_angle_refs (no tracker arg) -> :350 throwaway. Endpoint callable WITHOUT a running pipeline. 5 angles x $0.08 FLUX_KONTEXT = up to $0.40/character silently evades the budget gate; budget_usd=None means even the throwaway's own gate never fires; the cost block is wrapped in except Exception: print (Family-2 swallow compounding).
